hidden_defects.condition: Heartbeat is fresh while portfolio display truth is STALE or UNVERIFIED.
hidden_defects.impact: The first screen could show a green normal status even though cash, equity, positions, or PnL are not reviewable.
hidden_defects.fix: Operation status now stays yellow until portfolio_snapshot.status is VERIFIED.
hidden_defects.live_safety_impact: prevents operator misreading dashboard display truth as live or execution truth
hidden_defects.ux_impact: normal, warning, and recovery text now match portfolio trust state
